name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, turn



(* State variables *)
State == [i \in 1..N |-> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]

(* Initial state: all idle, turn = 1 *)
Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ turn \in 1..N

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
        /\ turn' = i
        /\ IF state[turn] = "trying" THEN
                state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]

                state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
            FI
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in State
          /\ turn \in 1..N

(* Mutual exclusion property: at most one process in critical *)
MutualExclusion == \A i, j \in 1..N : i /= j => state[i] # "critical" \/ state[j] # "critical"

THEOREM MutualExclusionIsInvariant == Spec => []MutualExclusion

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
ASSUME N \in Nat

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages



TypeOK == /\ participants \in [1..N -> {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}]
          /\ coordinator \in {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}
          /\ messages \in Seq

Init == /\ participants = [i \in 1..N |-> "Init"]
        /\ coordinator = "Init"
        /\ messages = <<>>

Prepare == /\ coordinator = "Init"
          /\ coordinator' = "Prepared"
          /\ messages' = Append(messages, "Prepare")

VoteYes(i) == /\ participants[i] = "Prepared"
             /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = "Committed"]
             /\ messages' = Append(messages, "VoteYes")

VoteNo(i) == /\ participants[i] = "Prepared"
            /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = "Aborted"]
            /\ messages' = Append(messages, "VoteNo")

Commit == /\ coordinator = "Prepared"
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : participants[i] = "Committed"
          /\ coordinator' = "Committed"
          /\ messages' = Append(messages, "Commit")

Abort == /\ coordinator = "Prepared"
        /\ \A i \in 1..N : participants[i] = "Aborted"
        /\ coordinator' = "Aborted"
        /\ messages' = Append(messages, "Abort")

Next == \/ Prepare
      \/ \E i \in 1..N : VoteYes(i)
      \/ \E i \in 1..N : VoteNo(i)
      \/ Commit
      \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* Forks: a sequence of length N where each element is either 0 (free) or the index of the philosopher holding it *)
Forks == [i \in 1..N |-> forks[i] \in {0} \cup 1..N]

(* State: a sequence of length N where each element is one of "thinking", "hungry", or "eating" *)
State == [i \in 1..N |-> state[i] \in {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

(* Helper to get left and right fork indices for philosopher i *)
LeftFork(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RightFork(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* Helper to check if philosopher i can eat *)
CanEat(i) == forks[LeftFork(i)] = 0 /\ forks[RightFork(i)] = 0

(* Action: philosopher i picks up forks if hungry and forks are free *)
TakeForks(i) == 
  /\ state[i] = "hungry"
  /\ CanEat(i)
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = i, ![RightFork(i)] = i]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

(* Action: philosopher i puts down forks after eating *)
PutForks(i) == 
  /\ state[i] = "eating"
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = 0, ![RightFork(i)] = 0]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

(* Action: philosopher i becomes hungry *)
Hungry(i) == 
  /\ state[i] = "thinking"
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
  /\ forks' = forks

(* Next action: any philosopher can become hungry, or any philosopher can take or put forks *)
Next == \E i \in 1..N : 
  (Hungry(i) \/ TakeForks(i) \/ PutForks(i))

(* Initial state: all forks are free, all philosophers are thinking *)
Init == 
  /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
  /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Type invariant: forks and state have correct types *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ forks \in Forks
  /\ state \in State

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Process
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

(* Type definitions *)
N == 3  (* Number of processes *)

Number == 0..N

(* Helper functions *)
maxNum == Max(Seq(num))

(* Initialization *)
Init == /\ num = [i \in Process |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in Process |-> FALSE]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \E i \in Process :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + maxNum]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

(* Mutual exclusion invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ num \in [Process -> Number]
          /\ flag \in [Process -> BOOLEAN]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ q \in Seq(1..K) \cup {<<>>}
  /\ head \in 1..K
  /\ tail \in 1..K
  /\ size \in 0..K

(* Initial state: empty queue *)
Init == 
  /\ q = <<>>
  /\ head = 1
  /\ tail = 1
  /\ size = 0

(* Producer action: enqueue an element x *)
Enqueue(x) == 
  /\ size < K
  /\ q' = Append(q, x)
  /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
  /\ size' = size + 1
  /\ UNCHANGED head

(* Consumer action: dequeue an element *)
Dequeue == 
  /\ size > 0
  /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
  /\ size' = size - 1
  /\ UNCHANGED <<q, tail>>

(* Next-state relation: either enqueue or dequeue *)
Next == 
  \E x \in 1..K : Enqueue(x) \/ Dequeue

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Servers

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state



TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in Nat
          /\ votedFor \in {None} \cup Servers
          /\ state \in {Follower, Candidate, Leader}

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = None
        /\ state = Follower

RequestVote(term, candidateId) ==
  /\ state = Follower
  /\ currentTerm <= term
  /\ votedFor = None \/ votedFor = candidateId
  /\ currentTerm' = term
  /\ votedFor' = candidateId
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state>>

VoteGranted(term, candidateId) ==
  /\ state = Candidate
  /\ currentTerm = term
  /\ votedFor = candidateId
  /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor>>

BecomeLeader ==
  /\ state = Candidate
  /\ currentTerm = currentTerm
  /\ votedFor = votedFor
  /\ state' = Leader
  /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor>>

Next == \/ RequestVote
        \/ VoteGranted
        \/ BecomeLeader

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>
